rationale: The proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). Fam. Code §52.01 governs juvenile custody and warning notices. The two provisions address entirely unrelated subject matter; no conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 52.01. TAKING INTO CUSTODY; ISSUANCE OF WARNING NOTICE.
_note: Rule text is wholly unrelated to the proposed change; no overlap in subject matter.
